date_of_joining: 5 th January 2026 (Examination leaves will be provided )

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 month Internship : Rs. 15,000/- pm Salary after 6 month Internship : CTC 5 LPA (Rs 33,438 pm in hand)
package_salary.bond: • A 1-year service agreement will be applicable from the date of joining. • In case the candidate resigns before completion of the agreement period or breaches any major clause (confidentiality, non-compete, non-solicitation, communication, etc.), the following penalty will be applicable: Compensation Cost/ Liquidated Damages: ₹1,80,000
